content: TASK-054 checkpoint done: ScreenFlow / Prototype View has been added to the existing @archmap/core architecture, not as a new engine. Added mode/profile screenflow parsing, node image/frame fields, edge trigger/hotspot/transition fields, scenarios, screenflow vocabulary, screenflow diagnostics, built-in registerView('prototype') DOM MountableView, RenderResult optional prototype methods, custom element scenario/show-hotspots attributes, controls Prototype option, examples/screenflow.archmap with mock SVG screens, docs/SYNTAX.md, docs/DELIVERY.md, docs/specs/v0.1/04-engine-api.md, and docs/specs/v0.1/05-screenflow-prototype.md. Verification: npm run typecheck; npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts test/render.test.ts test/parser.test.ts; npm test; npm run build; local dev server on http://127.0.0.1:4174/ with screenflow example/assets HTTP 200. Browser backend was unavailable in this session, so click-level hotspot/browser smoke is the main follow-up.
